raw_title: Efforts for Counterbalancing Platform Power Through Regulation: Online News Bills and Platform Dependency Disentanglement Lawmaking Initiatives in Brazil Between 2019 and 2025
title_en: Efforts for Counterbalancing Platform Power Through Regulation: Online News Bills and Platform Dependency Disentanglement Lawmaking Initiatives in Brazil Between 2019 and 2025
title_zh: Efforts for Counterbalancing Platform Power Through Regulation: Online News Bills and Platform Dependency Disentanglement Lawmaking Initiatives in Brazil Between 2019 and 2025
plain_summary_en: This paper studies Efforts for Counterbalancing Platform Power Through Regulation: Online News Bills and Platform Dependency Disentanglement Lawmaking Initiatives in Brazil Between 2019 and 2025. In plain terms, it asks what is happening, why it matters for public communication, and what evidence the authors use. The likely focus is Lawmaking, Dependency (UML), Power (physics), Legislature. The abstract suggests a mixed methods approach, which makes the work useful for understanding how communication changes in everyday life.
plain_summary_zh: This paper studies Efforts for Counterbalancing Platform Power Through Regulation: Online News Bills and Platform Dependency Disentanglement Lawmaking Initiatives in Brazil Between 2019 and 2025. In plain terms, it asks what is happening, why it matters for public communication, and what evidence the authors use. The likely focus is Lawmaking, Dependency (UML), Power (physics), Legislature. The abstract suggests a mixed methods approach, which makes the work useful for understanding how communication changes in everyday life.
research_direction_en: The paper points to an active research direction around Lawmaking, Dependency (UML), Power (physics), Legislature, especially how institutions, platforms, and audiences shape communication outcomes.
research_direction_zh: The paper points to an active research direction around Lawmaking, Dependency (UML), Power (physics), Legislature, especially how institutions, platforms, and audiences shape communication outcomes.
